  1. org.episteme.core.util.persistence

Uses of Annotation Interface
org.episteme.core.util.persistence.Persistent

Packages that use Persistent
Package
Description
org.episteme.core.mathematics.ml.neural
 
org.episteme.core.mathematics.ml.neural.layers
 
org.episteme.core.methodology
Core functionality for the org.episteme.core.methodology package in the Episteme library.
org.episteme.natural.biology
 
org.episteme.natural.biology.cell
 
org.episteme.natural.biology.ecology
 
org.episteme.natural.biology.evolution
 
org.episteme.natural.biology.genealogy
Biological taxonomy, genetics, and physiological modeling.
org.episteme.natural.biology.neuroscience
 
org.episteme.natural.biology.taxonomy
 
org.episteme.natural.chemistry
 
org.episteme.natural.chemistry.biochemistry
 
org.episteme.natural.chemistry.spectroscopy
 
org.episteme.natural.computing.ai.agents.services
 
org.episteme.natural.computing.ml
 
org.episteme.natural.earth
 
org.episteme.natural.earth.coordinates
 
org.episteme.natural.earth.seismology
 
org.episteme.natural.engineering
 
org.episteme.natural.engineering.fluids
 
org.episteme.natural.medicine
Provides the org.episteme.social.medicine module.
org.episteme.natural.methodology.experiment
Core functionality for the org.episteme.core.methodology.experiment package in the Episteme library.
org.episteme.natural.physics.classical.mechanics
 
org.episteme.social.architecture
Provides mathematical and analytical models for architectural engineering, building physics, and urban history.
org.episteme.social.architecture.traffic
Provides models and simulation engines for urban traffic flow analysis.
org.episteme.social.arts
- artworks, music, literature classification.
org.episteme.social.arts.music
- musical notes, instruments, compositions.
org.episteme.social.economics
Provides comprehensive mathematical models for economic systems, agent-based modeling, and financial analysis.
org.episteme.social.economics.models
 
org.episteme.social.economics.money
Provides classes for monetary and financial operations.
org.episteme.social.economics.resources
Provides classes and interfaces for representing economic resources.
org.episteme.social.geography
Provides classes for social geography, human settlements, and mapping.
org.episteme.social.history
- historical events, timelines, and chronology.
org.episteme.social.history.archeology
Provides classes and interfaces for archaeological research and analysis.
org.episteme.social.history.clock
Provides the org.episteme.social.history.time module.
org.episteme.social.history.time
Temporal coordinate and interval support for historical analysis.
org.episteme.social.law
Provides the org.episteme.social.law module.
org.episteme.social.linguistics
Provides mathematical and computational models for natural language processing, linguistic analysis, and glottochronology.
org.episteme.social.medicine.consultation
Core functionality for the org.episteme.social.medicine.consultation package in the Episteme library.
org.episteme.social.philosophy
Provides support for philosophy, including formal logic, ethics, epistemology, and storytelling.
org.episteme.social.philosophy.epistemology
Provides classes for modeling epistemology, the study of knowledge and justified belief.
org.episteme.social.politics
Provides the org.episteme.social.politics module.
org.episteme.social.psychology
Provides the org.episteme.social.psychology module.
org.episteme.social.psychology.social
Provides the org.episteme.social.psychology.social module.
org.episteme.social.sociology
- social structures, persons, and cultural modeling.
org.episteme.social.sociology.survey
Core functionality for the org.episteme.social.sociology.survey package in the Episteme library.
org.episteme.social.sports
Provides classes and interfaces for sports science, athletic performance analysis, and competition modeling.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    ActivationFunction
    Extensible categorization of neural network activation functions.
    interface 
    Layer<T>
    Represents a layer in a neural network.

    Classes in org.episteme.core.methodology with annotations of type Persistent
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Instrument
    Represents a measuring instrument used in scientific experiments.
    class 
    Observation<T>
    Represents a captured data point during an experiment.
    class 
    Sample<P>
    Represents a physical or conceptual sample used in a scientific experiment.
    class 
    ScientificAnalysis
    Represents a scientific analysis linking a sample to experimental results.
    class 
    ScientificDescription
    A formal description of a scientific entity, observation, or theory.
    class 
    ScientificExperiment<I,R>
    A robust, persistent implementation of the Experiment interface.
    final class 
    ScientificField
    Extensible enumeration for scientific fields/disciplines.
    class 
    ScientificReport
    Represents a formal scientific or technical report.
    class 
    ScientificTerm
    Represents a scientific term with its definition and source reference.

    class

    class 
    Vitamin

    Treatment

  • Uses of Persistent in org.episteme.natural.methodology.experiment

    Classes in org.episteme.natural.methodology.experiment with annotations of type Persistent
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Subject
    A class representing an animal or human subject that takes part in an experiment.
    class 
    Task
    An abstract representation of a specific task within an experimental study.
    class 
    Trial
    Represents a single execution or measurement event within an experimental task.
    class 
    TrialExperiment
    A class representing a scientific experiment involving subjects, tasks, and variables.
    class 
    ValuedVariable
    Represents a specific measurement or assignment for a Variable during an experiment.
    class 
    Variable
    Represents a measurable or manipulable variable in a scientific experiment.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Artist
    Represents an artist (painter, sculptor, musician, etc.) as a specialized social role.
    class 
    Artwork
    Represents a piece of art (Artwork), integrating historical, geographical, economic, and scientific dimensions.
    class 
    Book
    Represents a book or publication within the literary arts.
    class 
    Collection
    Represents a collection of artworks, typically held by a museum, gallery, or private collector. * @version 2.0
    class 
    Film
    Represents a film or motion picture within the cinematic arts.

    Classes in org.episteme.social.economics with annotations of type Persistent
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Bank
    Represents a banking institution capable of managing accounts and providing currency conversion services.
    class 
    Community
    Represents a primitive or cooperative social group where resources are shared.
    final class 
    Department
    Extensible enumeration for Organizational Department.
    final class 
    EconomicProcess
    Extensible enumeration for Economic Process.
    class 
    Economy
    Functional abstraction for an economic system, encompassing organizations, central banking, and macro-financial indicators.
    class 
    Factory
    An organization specialized in mass production and transformation of resources.
    final class 
    IndustryCategory
    Extensible enumeration for Industry Category.
    final class 
    IndustrySector
    Extensible enumeration for Industry Sector.
    final class 
    ManagementLevel
    Extensible enumeration for Management Level.
    class 
    Market
    Represents a market where goods are traded.
    final class 
    MarketStructure
    Extensible enumeration for Market Structure.
    class 
    MaterialResource
    Represents a physical or tangible resource with a unique identification (serial number).
    class 
    Organigram
    Represents a formal organizational structure (organigram).
    class 
    Organization
    Represents a formal social and economic entity (Company, NGO, Government).
    class 
    OrganizationTask
    A class representing the transformation of some materials and some human ressources into a finished something that can be sold.
    final class 
    PortfolioData
    Data model for the FinancialPortfolioViewer.
    static class 
    PortfolioData.Asset
     
    static class 
    PortfolioData.Holding
     
    class 
    PotentialResource
    A class representing a potential or virtual resource, such as oil in the soil that is expected to be found, or ingredients required in a recipe or task.
    class 
    Resource
    A class representing a physical or virtual resource with ownership, position, and temporal attributes.
    class 
    Task
    Represents a transformation process where materials and human resources are converted into finished products or services.
    class 
    Trade
    Represents a commercial exchange between two economic agents.
    class 
    Worker
    Represents a worker within an Organization.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Account
    Represents a bank account for storing money and financial assets.
    final class 
    Check
    Represents a paper check as a form of payment.
    final class 
    Coin
    Represents a physical coin or banknote.
    class 
    Currency
    Represents a currency as a unit of monetary measurement.
    class 
    Money
    Represents a quantity of money with currency.
    final class 
    Quote
    Represents a market quote for a financial instrument.
    final class 
    Receipt
    Represents a receipt for a completed transaction.
    final class 
    Share
    Represents a share (stock) in a company.
    final class 
    Transaction
    Represents a financial transaction between two parties.
    final class 
    Wallet
    Represents a wallet for storing money.

  • Uses of Persistent in org.episteme.social.geography

    Classes in org.episteme.social.geography with annotations of type Persistent
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Address
    Represents a mailing or physical address for a location.
    class 
    BusinessPlace
    Represents a business location, office, or industrial site.
    class 
    City
    Represents a city or urban settlement.
    final record 
    ClimateZone
    Represents a simplified KÃ¶ppen climate classification and associated metrics.
    class 
    GeoMap
    Represents a logical map of a geographical area, containing places and paths.
    class 
    GeoPath
    Represents a geographical path, which can consist of multiple disjoint segments (MultiLineString).
    static class 
    GeoPath.SimpleGeoPath
    Inner class representing a single continuous path segment.
    class 
    GeoPolygon
    A geographical polygon supporting multiple disjoint regions (exclaves) and holes (enclaves).
    static class 
    GeoPolygon.SimpleGeoPolygon
    Inner class representing a simple polygon (1 exterior + N interiors).
    class 
    HeightMap
    A specialized map containing elevation data (Digital Elevation Model).
    class 
    Home
    Represents a residence, a specific place where individuals live.
    class 
    OwnedPlace
    Represents a piece of land or building that is owned by one or more economic agents.
    class 
    Region
    A region is an area, typically part of a country or the world, having definable characteristics but not always fixed boundaries.
    class 
    TimedBoundary
    A geographic boundary that changes over time.
    class 
    TimedPlace
    A place that supports boundaries that change over time.

  • Uses of Persistent in org.episteme.social.history

    Classes in org.episteme.social.history with annotations of type Persistent
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static final record 
    BorderEvolution.BorderChange
    Represents a specific event that changed territorial boundaries.
    static final record 
    BorderEvolution.Territory
    Represents a defined geographical territory under specific sovereignty.
    static final record 
    CounterfactualSimulator.ContingencyEvent
    Internal representation of a historical event with its causal dependencies.
    static final record 
    CounterfactualSimulator.CounterfactualScenario
    Defines a specific counterfactual scenario starting from a divergence point.
    static final record 
    CounterfactualSimulator.SimulationResult
    The analytical results of a counterfactual simulation.
    class 
    Event
    Represents a significant historical or scientific event.
    class 
    GeologicalEra
    Represents a geological era or division of time.
    final class 
    GeologicalTimeScale
    Official divisions of geological time according to the International Commission on Stratigraphy (ICS).
    static final record 
    HistoricalCurrencyConverter.Currency
    Represents a historical currency and its period of circulation.
    static final record 
    HistoricalCurrencyConverter.ExchangeRate
    Historical exchange rate between two currencies.
    static final record 
    HistoricalDemography.DemographicSnapshot
    Data record representing population status at a point in time.
    class 
    HistoricalEra
    Represents a historical era or period.
    class 
    HistoricalEvent
    Represents a significant historical event with support for imprecise dating and duration.
    class 
    HistoricalTimeline
    A timeline representing a sequence of historical events.
    static final record 
    MilitaryCampaignAnalyzer.Army
    Composition and capabilities of a military force.
    static final record 
    MilitaryCampaignAnalyzer.CampaignAnalysis
    Final report of campaign feasibility and requirements.
    static final record 
    MilitaryCampaignAnalyzer.SupplyRequirements
    Quantified daily needs for a specific army.
    static final record 
    MilitaryCampaignAnalyzer.TerrainSegment
    Physical characteristics of a geographical segment of a campaign route.
    static final record 
    NumismaticAnalyzer.Coin
    Data record representing a historical coin and its metal composition.
    static final record 
    PaleographyAssistant.DatingResult
    Encapsulates the statistical results of a paleographical analysis.
    static final record 
    PaleographyAssistant.ScriptFeature
    Specific calligraphic or typographic feature used to distinguish scripts.
    class 
    PositionedEvent
    An event that also has a geographical position.
    class 
    Timeline<E extends Event>
    A sequence or collection of events organized in time.
    static final record 
    TradeRouteMapper.RouteSegment
    Specific segment between two consecutive trading posts in a route.
    static final record 
    TradeRouteMapper.TradeRoute
    Represents an established trade route consisting of multiple waypoints.
    static final record 
    TradeRouteMapper.TradingPost
    Represents a historical trading hub with its geographical location and primary goods.

  • Uses of Persistent in org.episteme.social.history.archeology

    Classes in org.episteme.social.history.archeology with annotations of type Persistent
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Civilization
    Represents a civilization, modeled as a culture distributed through space and time.
    class 
    Item
    Represents an archaeological item (fossil, artifact, etc.) found at a site.
    class 
    Site
    Represents an archaeological field site.
    static class 
    Site.Item
    Inner class representing a discovered item.
    class 
    Stratum
    A distinct layer or unit of context in a stratigraphic sequence.

    Classes in org.episteme.social.history.clock with annotations of type Persistent
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ChineseTime
    Represents Traditional Chinese Time.
    class 
    DecimalTime
    Represents time using a decimal system (10h/100m/100s per day).
    class 
    HexadecimalTime
    Represents Hexadecimal Time (16h per day, 16 maximes per hour, 16 minutes per maxime, 16 seconds per minute).
    class 
    InternetTime
    Represents Swatch Internet Time, dividing the day into 1000 ".beats".
    class 
    ModernTime
    Standard representation of time using the Gregorian/Modern system (24h/60m/60s).
    class 
    TimeEvent
    An event indicating a change or occurrence in a time simulation or tracking system.

  • Uses of Persistent in org.episteme.social.history.time

    Classes in org.episteme.social.history.time with annotations of type Persistent
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    FuzzyTimePoint
    Represents a historical or cosmic date with varying degrees of precision and uncertainty.
    class 
    Time
    An abstract base class for different time representation systems.

  • Uses of Persistent in org.episteme.social.law

    Classes in org.episteme.social.law with annotations of type Persistent
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Act
    A class representing a legal act or certificate (contract, deed, etc.)
    class 
    Contract
    A class representing a legal contract or agreement between organizations or individuals.
    class 
    Jurisdiction
    Represents a legal jurisdiction, defined by its name, territory, and set of applicable statutes.
    class 
    Statute
    Represents a legal statute, law, or regulation.
    class 
    Treaty
    Represents a formal agreement between multiple human groups (nations, organizations, etc.).

  • Uses of Persistent in org.episteme.social.linguistics

    Classes in org.episteme.social.linguistics with annotations of type Persistent
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ChatSituation
    Represents the interaction of participants communicating.
    final class 
    EtymologyGraph
    Graph structure for tracking word derivations and linguistic ancestry across languages.
    class 
    Grammar
    Represents the grammar rules for parsing a language.
    class 
    Grapheme
    Represents a grapheme - the minimal unit of written language.
    class 
    Language
    Represents a human language as a systematic linguistic entity.
    class 
    Lexeme
    Represents a lexemeâ€”an abstract unit of the lexicon in a language that encompasses all inflected forms of a single word.
    class 
    Lexicon
    Represents a lexicon - a dictionary of lexemes with definitions.
    class 
    Morpheme
    Represents a morphemeâ€”the smallest irreducible unit of meaning or grammatical function within a language.
    class 
    Phoneme
    Represents a phoneme - the minimal unit of sound in a language.
    class 
    Phrase
    Represents a phraseâ€”a group of words that function together as a single syntactic unit within a sentence but do not necessarily contain a subject and a predicate (clause). * @version 2.0
    class 
    Sentence
    Represents a sentence, a sequence of phrases or words that expresses a complete thought or proposition.
    class 
    Text
    Represents a document or textual passage, composed of a sequence of sentences.
    class 
    VerbalCommunication
    Represents a single act of verbal communication between locutors.
    class 
    Word
    Represents a linguistic word, defined as a sequence of one or more morphemes that form a minimal meaningful unit of language. * @version 2.0

  • Uses of Persistent in org.episteme.social.medicine.consultation

    Classes in org.episteme.social.medicine.consultation with annotations of type Persistent
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Doctor
    The Doctor class provides some useful information for people whose job is to cure individuals.
    class 
    Patient
    The Patient class provides some useful information about the health of an individual.

  • Uses of Persistent in org.episteme.social.philosophy

    Classes in org.episteme.social.philosophy with annotations of type Persistent
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Belief
    Represents a fundamental conviction or tenet within a philosophical system.
    class 
    Concept
    Represents a key idea or element within a philosophical framework.
    class 
    Model
    Represents a logical organization or cluster of interrelated concepts.
    class 
    PhilosophicalCurrent
    Represents a well-defined group of philosophical ideas or schools of thought.

  • Uses of Persistent in org.episteme.social.philosophy.epistemology

    Classes in org.episteme.social.philosophy.epistemology with annotations of type Persistent
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Subject
    Represents an epistemic agent (human, organization, or AI) capable of holding beliefs and acquiring knowledge.

  • Uses of Persistent in org.episteme.social.politics

    Classes in org.episteme.social.politics with annotations of type Persistent
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Administration
    Represents a state-managed administrative organization (agency, ministry, police, etc.).
    final class 
    Ballot
    Represents a cast ballot in an election, supporting various voting methods.
    class 
    Candidate
    Represents the role of a candidate within a political situation (e.g., an election).
    class 
    Citizen
    Represents a person's legal status as a citizen, including nationalities and identification.
    class 
    City
    Represents a city.
    class 
    Country
    Represents a sovereign state, kingdom, empire, or modern nation-state.
    final class 
    CountryCode
    Extensible listing of Country Codes (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2).
    final class 
    DevelopmentStatus
    Extensible enumeration for Development Status.
    class 
    Election
    Represents a political election event, aggregating votes for candidates.
    class 
    Federation
    Represents a group of countries cooperating within a formal union or federation.
    final class 
    GovernmentForm
    Extensible enumeration for Government Forms.
    final class 
    Ideology
    Extensible enumeration for Political Ideologies.
    class 
    Nation
    Represents a sovereign nation or organized human group (modern tribe).
    class 
    Party
    Represents a political party, characterized by its ideology, leadership, and organization. * @version 1.1
    final class 
    PoliticalSpectrum
    Extensible enumeration for Political Spectrum.
    class 
    Settlement
    Represents a localized, often primitive or community-level settlement (Chiefdom, Colony, Tribe site).

  • Uses of Persistent in org.episteme.social.psychology

    Classes in org.episteme.social.psychology with annotations of type Persistent
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    BigFiveProfile.OCEAN
    Represents a personality profile using the Five Factor Model.
    static class 
    CognitiveLoadModel.CognitiveState
    Represents the resulting cognitive state of an individual performing a task.
    static class 
    CognitiveLoadModel.LoadFactor
    Represents the components of cognitive load involved in a task.

  • Uses of Persistent in org.episteme.social.psychology.social

    Classes in org.episteme.social.psychology.social with annotations of type Persistent
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Group
    Represents a group of individuals from a psychological and social perspective.
    class 
    HumanGroup
    Represents a group of human individuals (Homo Sapiens).
    class 
    HumanTimeline
    A specialized timeline for tracking events in a specific category of human life.
    class 
    Tribe
    Represents a human tribe, which is an organized human group with a distinct name and culture.

  • Uses of Persistent in org.episteme.social.sociology

    Classes in org.episteme.social.sociology with annotations of type Persistent
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Celebration
    Represents a cultural or religious celebration (feast, rite of passage, festival).
    class 
    Culture
    Represents the cumulative shared elements of a social group or civilization.
    final class 
    EducationLevel
    Represents an extensible set of education levels, facilitating support for various national systems.
    class 
    Family
    Represents a family unit within the social structure.
    final class 
    Gender
    Extensible gender categories for social and psychological modeling.
    class 
    Group
    Represents a formal or informal social group of individuals.
    final class 
    GroupKind
    An extensible enumeration for social group classifications.
    class 
    Human
    Represents a human individual.
    class 
    Member
    Represents an individual participant in a social ritual or celebration.
    final class 
    Occupation
    Represents an extensible set of occupation types for individuals.
    final class 
    OrganizationSector
    Categorical classification of organizational sectors.
    class 
    Person
    Represents a human individual as a social agent.
    class 
    Religion
    Represents a religion, faith tradition, or spiritual system.
    final class 
    ReligionType
    Categories of religious systems based on theological structure.
    class 
    Role
    Represents a social role assumed by an individual within a specific situation.
    final class 
    RoleKind
    Categorical classification of social roles.
    class 
    School
     
    final class 
    SchoolLevel
    Extensible enumeration for school levels (tiers).
    final class 
    SchoolType
    Extensible enumeration for school types.
    class 
    Situation
    Represents a social interaction context where individuals assume specific roles.
    class 
    SocialNetwork
    Represents a social network graph where persons are nodes and relationships are edges.
    class 
    Society
    Represents a society, defined by its type, culture, institutions, and geographic location.
    final class 
    SocietyType
    Categories of societal development stages.

  • Uses of Persistent in org.episteme.social.sociology.survey

    Classes in org.episteme.social.sociology.survey with annotations of type Persistent
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Question
    Base class for all survey questions.
    final class 
    QuestionType
    Extensible enumeration for question types in surveys.
    class 
    Survey
    Represents a complete survey or questionnaire.
    class 
    SurveyResponse
    Represents a filled-out survey response by a participant.

  • Uses of Persistent in org.episteme.social.sports

    Classes in org.episteme.social.sports with annotations of type Persistent
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Match
    Represents a discrete sports match between two teams or individuals.
    static class 
    RatingSystems.Glicko2Rating
    Data model for a Glicko-2 rating profile.
    class 
    Sport
    Represents a specific sport or athletic discipline.
    class 
    Team
    Represents an organized sports team within a specific discipline.
